headline: Rare 1776 Declaration Found in UK Archives
meta_description: A volunteer discovered a rare 1776 printing of the US Declaration of Independence at Britain's National Archives—one of only 11 surviving copies.
summary_short: A volunteer at the National Archives discovered a rare 1776 Declaration of Independence, the only known copy outside the United States.
body:
While sorting through historical letters and papers, a volunteer at the National Archives in Kew made an extraordinary discovery: a 1776 printing of the Declaration of Independence. This is no ordinary document. Only 11 copies of this particular printing are known to exist worldwide, making it an exceptionally rare artifact of world history.

What makes this find even more remarkable is its location. This is the sole known copy of this edition to be found outside the United States. As the Archives prepares to display this treasure, it joins a small and distinguished group of historical documents that connect us directly to one of the defining moments of modern democracy.
